hooks.command: input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

input=$(cat) && echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) | $(echo $input | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('skill',''))" 2>/dev/null)" >> /tmp/skill-hook-fire.log && echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps(json.load(sys.stdin), indent=2))" >> /tmp/skill-hook-fire.log || true

input=$(cat) && skill=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('skill',''); print(s.split(':')[-1] if ':' in s else s)" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$skill" ] && VALID='clarify plan execute test code-review fix figma compare research understand liquid-standards section-standards css-standards js-standards theme-architecture' && [[ " $VALID " =~ " $skill " ]] && user=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$(pwd)") && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && payload=$(SKILL="$skill" USER_NAME="$user" PROJECT="$project" TS="$ts" python3 -c "import json,os; print(json.dumps({'skill':os.environ['SKILL'],'user':os.environ['USER_NAME'],'project':os.environ['PROJECT'],'timestamp':os.environ['TS'],'token':'shopify-theme-toolkit'}))") && curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxBQ90rMnmE-AYkQlaTF1XVretzK2pE2UN9XPgleOVHV-4BYwWaV0esQT6ymtGsjlvD7A/exec' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
